description: Default Natural Approaches product catalog for optional product recommendations in the wellness scan platform.

products.name: Discovery Session
products.summary: A practitioner-led consultation to interpret findings, prioritise next steps, and build a personalised plan.
products.patient_note: Useful when findings need practitioner interpretation, prioritisation, or a more tailored plan.

products.name: Rhythm Reset Code™
products.summary: A structured foundational protocol designed to support energy, rhythm, metabolic resilience, and broader whole-body recovery.
products.patient_note: Often relevant when scan patterns suggest a broader need for systemic support rather than one isolated intervention.

products.name: Deep Detox Code™
products.summary: A structured detoxification programme intended to support elimination, liver-gut function, and reduction of accumulated internal burden.
products.patient_note: Often considered when the scan suggests toxic load, sluggish elimination, inflammatory burden, or broader detoxification stress.

products.name: DNA & Epigenetic Testing
products.summary: An advanced testing option to explore inherited tendencies and modifiable expression patterns that may help explain recurring functional themes.
products.patient_note: Useful where repeated patterns suggest a need to understand deeper constitutional or metabolic tendencies.

products.name: Food Sensitivity Testing
products.summary: A testing option to explore delayed food-reactivity patterns that may contribute to inflammatory, digestive, skin, or immune presentations.
products.patient_note: Often relevant where gut, skin, allergy, or inflammatory patterns suggest hidden dietary triggers may be involved.

products.name: Hair Tissue Mineral Analysis
products.summary: A mineral and toxic-element screen that can help explore nutrient trends, stress patterns, and longer-term exposure load.
products.patient_note: Often useful where mineral imbalance, fatigue, thyroid patterns, stress adaptation, or toxic burden are recurring themes.
